mapper.select: SELECT l.id AS id, l.operate_emp_id AS operateEmpId, e.name AS operateEmpName, l.operate_time AS operateTime, l.class_name AS className, l.method_name AS methodName, l.method_params AS methodParams, l.return_value AS returnValue, l.cost_time AS costTime FROM operate_log AS l LEFT JOIN emp AS e ON l.operate_emp_id = e.id
